description_long: This is a modern, angular shelving and storage unit with a matte black finish. The left side features four large, octagonal open cubby compartments stacked vertically, ideal for storing or displaying items. The right side includes two open rectangular shelves and two pull-out drawers with metallic handles, providing both open and closed storage options. The overall structure is geometric, with sharp, beveled edges and a slightly slanted profile, giving it a contemporary look. The unit appears to be constructed primarily from wood or engineered wood, with metal hardware for the drawer handles. Its robust build and ample storage make it suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public waiting areas.
description: A matte black, angular shelving unit with four octagonal cubbies, two open shelves, and two drawers with metal handles. Its geometric design and ample storage make it ideal for modern urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing four octagonal cubbies on the left, two open shelves, and two drawers with handles on the right.
description_view_1: Side view showing the solid, flat side panel and the depth of the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed back and the protruding octagonal cubbies.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the stacked octagonal cubbies and the unit's overall thickness.
